content.en:
Another period of time has passed, and the resources of the Demon Seed Abyss have almost been continuously scraped by various forces.

Ye Tian also let the human race enter the demon seed abyss at will, but the realm god with a serious problem of the eternal Dao seed still did not allow him to go deep into the demon seed abyss for too long, otherwise it would be easy to be transformed into a demon seed by the will of the demon seed abyss.

Without the hindrance of the demon seed, those ordinary resources have been taken away by many realm gods, and even the resources that are easy to cause the transformation of the eternal Dao seed demon seed have also been taken away.

Gradually, the resources of the Demon Seed Abyss were gradually scraped, causing the Demon Seed Abyss to become a barren land.

However, no one dared to completely occupy the abyss of the demon seed.

They can't help the will of the Demon Seed Abyss, which means that they can't really control the Demon Seed Abyss, and if they stay here for a long time, the peak realm gods will have problems.

So.

After a long time, the entrances to the Demon Seed Abyss were still blocked, and the gods of the realm were not allowed to enter.

......

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, thirty trillion years have passed.

During this period of time, the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm were very calm, and the supreme forces had disappeared, but the Eternal Realm was becoming more and more prosperous, and high-level realm gods were born one after another.

Of course.

The changes in the human race are great, and many high-level peak realm gods have been born.

Moreover, some high-level peak realm gods have already cultivated the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit and are ready to start impacting the peak realm god cultivation.

this day.

A high-level peak realm god of the Ye family exchanged for a Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, and then went to attack the peak realm god.

Due to the lot of preparations made by this high-level peak realm god, the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass was just one of the extradimensional resources.

Moreover, with the assistance of the Ye family, this high-level peak realm god finally broke through successfully and became another peak realm god of the human race.

In the years that followed, the peak realm gods of the human race were born one by one, and they were no longer just a few peak realm gods, so shabby.

The more gods in the peak realm, Ye Tian's mood was naturally good.

In addition, his cultivation has not improved much, and he is still a long way from condensing the eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit.

However, his combat power has increased by a cut, as long as he successfully fuses the second extradimensional object.

Now, each of his replica bodies has fused with a second extra-dimensional thing, so that he can urge the two extra-dimensional things, and he will have more extra-dimensional techniques and more lasting combat power.

Therefore, his strength now is much stronger than in the past.

this day.

A replica of Ye Tian's body explored in the Death Void and came to an area where it was blocked by an invisible wall.

In order to come here, he also sacrificed many replica bodies, so that he found a safe route.

He was about to shuttle over, but was directly blocked by the wall, and then stopped.

Immediately, he touched the invisible wall with both hands, and gradually frowned.

"It seems to be invisible, but it is the extradimensional power of condensation and compression, which is the extradimensional wall~. "

Ye Tian tried to attack.

As a result, he didn't even have the qualifications to make ripples with his full force, this extradimensional wall was far from something he could shatter, and he didn't even have the qualifications to strike a crack.

Next, he walked along the extradimensional wall, and found that no matter how he walked, he would encounter it.

This made him very curious.

Eternal borders.

In the middle of an ancient city.

Ye Tian met the multi-dimensional realm gods of the Two Realms Gate here, and over the years, he had many contacts with the multi-dimensional realm gods, and the relationship was quite good.

And.

The Two Realms Gate walked out of a half-step extradimensional realm, although the half-step extradimensional realm did not come back, I don't know which territory it was, but the two realms gate was still able to get more useful information and retribution from this half-step extradimensional realm. []

This is also the reason why Ye Tian befriended the multi-dimensional realm gods, and the multi-dimensional realm gods were willing to befriend Ye Tian because they valued Ye Tian's potential.

"Multidimensional Realm God, there is a wall condensed by extradimensional power in the Void of Death, no matter what aspect it is, you know what that wall is?" Ye Tian asked.

When the multidimensional realm god heard this, his pupils shrank, and he was very shocked.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, you actually went to the boundary of the extradimensional realm!"

Multidimensional Shinto.

"Extradimensional Territory Boundary?" Ye Tian wondered.

The Multidimensional Realm God introduced, "You should know that our territory is called Territory Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two. "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He didn't know it before, but last time on the Garanbo ship, that's what the pinnacle realm god of the Garanbo ship called here.

The Multidimensional Realm God continued, "'I don't know exactly how many realms there are in the Death Void, but we are ranked in the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Realm, and there must be so many realms, if not far more. And the division of each territory is based on the boundary of the extradimensional territory, and what you encounter is the boundary extradimensional barrier, and the normal peak realm god cannot break this extradimensional barrier at all. It is precisely because we cannot break it that we do not think of crossing the Void of Death to other realms. "

"The Naga Blue Treasure Ship has a way to travel to the margins, isn't it relying on the strength of that half-step transcendent realm?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Not really!" the Multidimensional Realm God shook his head, "According to my understanding, even a half-step Extradimensional Realm cannot break the boundary barrier, and it is said that a special means are required to travel through the boundary barrier. There must be a real extradimensional realm behind the Garanbao ship, and this is the way to come and go freely and the boundary extradimensional barrier. And this method is unknown to us. If we knew, wouldn't we be able to wear (Zhao De Zhao) shuttle to various territories at will!"

After listening to the narration of the multi-dimensional realm god, he completely gave up his own shuttle to the border of the territory to go to other realms, which was not possible at all, even if he comprehended the true super-dimensional power, condensed the super-dimensional Dao species, and became a half-step super-dimensional realm, there was no way to shuttle through.

Now it seems that he can only wait for the arrival of the Garanbo ship, and then let one of his replica bodies follow him to the Garanbo ship.

Only in this way can you really travel to other frontiers and see a wider territory.

Ye Tian chatted with the Multidimensional Realm God for a while, and then separated.

In the following days, most of Ye Tian's copied bodies were roaming the Death Void, collecting as many resources as possible, and he was also refining the Eternal Dao Seed with all his strength to improve his cultivation.

He wants to condense the eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit before the arrival of the Garanbao Ship, so that his strength will be stronger.
